sections.instruction: Questions 11-16: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 17-20: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: To find out more about reservations, one needs to
options: A click a link in a corner of the page
B navigate to another page on the website
C call a number that is at the bottom of the page

questions.content: ‘Extreme Tours’ are special vacation packages for those
options: A who desire to visit safe destinations
B who need to see familiar places
C who want to have a really exciting experience

questions.content: The travel agency says these excursions will give people the chance to
options: A see famous and well-known tourist sites
B test themselves and become stronger
C buy lots of interesting souvenirs

questions.content: The company has offices in South America, Australia and
Unlike other companies, Fremen allows you to
options: A hire a car for the duration of your vacation
C speak with a travel agent for free

sections.instruction: Questions 21-26: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 27-30: What problems do Jimi and Janis identify for each art project? Choose your answers from the box and write the letters A-G next to questions 27-30.

questions.content: What problems do Jimi and Janis identify for each art project?

sections.instruction: Questions 31-35: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. Questions 36-38: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 39 and 40: Choose TWO letters A-F.

questions.content: Gray wolves are now found only in Canada, Alaska, Northern Eurasia and
options: A many other places in the southern hemisphere
B a few other isolated areas in the world

questions.content: Supporters of the reintroduction program agreed to
options: A give money to people whose cattle were at risk
B delay restoring the wolf population for several years

questions.content: After reintroducing the wolves, biodiversity in Yellowstone Park increased and
What are TWO results of the wolf reintroduction program in Yellowstone Park?
options: B there are fewer tourists in Yellowstone
C eagle and hawk species have increased
D Yellowstone is not as healthy as before
E the local economy has benefitted
